title: Services | Your Name
description: A generic services or skills page for the starter template.
heroTitle: Explain what you help with, without sounding vague
heroText: Use short, concrete cards here to describe your services, strengths, or support areas. The goal is clarity, not inflated claims.

cards.title: Strategy and structure
cards.text: Help people make sense of messy information, clarify direction, and decide on the next useful move.

cards.title: Research and writing
cards.text: Turn complex material into clearer notes, summaries, briefing documents, or public-facing writing.

cards.title: Operations and delivery
cards.text: Support planning, follow-through, coordination, and the practical side of getting work across the line.

cards.title: Communication support
cards.text: Use this space for interviewing, facilitation, translation, meeting support, or stakeholder-facing work.
